mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_pw, u.user_nm, u.dept_code, u.admin_yn, u.use_yn, COALESCE(d.dept_name, '') AS dept_name FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_dept d ON u.dept_code = d.dept_code WHERE u.user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT r.role_cd, r.role_nm FROM tb_user_role ur JOIN tb_role r ON ur.role_cd = r.role_cd AND r.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE ur.user_id = #{user_id}

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN rm.srch_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS srch_yn, MAX(CASE WHEN rm.new_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS new_yn, MAX(CASE WHEN rm.save_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS save_yn, MAX(CASE WHEN rm.del_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS del_yn, MAX(CASE WHEN rm.prnt_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS prnt_yn, MAX(CASE WHEN rm.upld_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS upld_yn, MAX(CASE WHEN rm.init_yn = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS init_yn FROM tb_user_role ur JOIN tb_role_menu rm ON ur.role_cd = rm.role_cd JOIN tb_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.menu_id AND m.pgm_id = #{pgm_id} WHERE ur.user_id = #{user_id}

SELECT da.auth_type, da.auth_target, da.table_name FROM tb_user_role ur JOIN tb_data_auth da ON ur.role_cd = da.role_cd WHERE ur.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY CASE da.auth_type WHEN 'ALL' THEN 1 WHEN 'DEPT_SUB' THEN 2 WHEN 'DEPT' THEN 3 WHEN 'USER' THEN 4 END

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.menu_nm, m.parent_id, m.menu_type, m.pgm_id, m.url, m.icon, m.sort_order FROM tb_menu m LEFT JOIN tb_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN tb_user_role ur ON rm.role_cd = ur.role_cd AND ur.user_id = #{user_id} WHERE m.use_yn = 'Y' AND (m.menu_type = 'G' OR ur.user_id IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY m.sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET user_pw = #{user_pw}, updated_by = #{user_id}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
